admin_role: isolated worker and configuration surface, not OS elevation and not a third governance brain
grok_4_5_role: Grok endpoint identity; model work is selected dynamically by the canonical router
codex_role: thinking orchestration, dynamic agent delegation, and tightly coupled single writer
cross_repository_writes: Codex only within the current user-authorized task
interactive_session_ownership: one verified owner; ambiguity is read-only
